identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a high-density, functional inventory dashboard that feels like a precision instrument, not a generic admin panel.

layout.surface_rules: Use border-collapse style layouts for data tables. Avoid rounded corners on internal table cells. Use subtle 1px borders.

Table.instructions: Use a 'border-collapse' look. Headers should have a subtle bottom border. Rows should have hover effects (bg-muted/50). No vertical borders inside the table. Generous cell padding (p-4).

Button.instructions: Use rounded-md. Primary buttons should be #2563EB with white text. Secondary buttons should be outline or ghost.

Card.instructions: Use sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-lg) borders. White background. 1px border #E4E4E7. No shadow by default, shadow-sm on hover.

Input.instructions: bg-white border-input focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-transparent rounded-md

Modal.instructions: Use Dialog component. Backdrop blur-sm. White content box with rounded-lg. Distinct header and footer sections.

StatusBadge.instructions: Rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold. Use status_colors palette.

visual_enhancers.grid_borders: Add a subtle grid background or border pattern to empty spaces to emphasize precision.
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: All interactive elements must have hover/active states. Buttons should have a slight lift on hover.
visual_enhancers.empty_states: Use technical illustrations or simple geometric shapes for empty states.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Manrope' for all headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Add these fonts via Google Fonts.
Implement the 'Swiss Grid' table style: clean horizontal lines, no vertical lines in body, generous padding.
Use the provided status colors for the 'Estado' (Status) and 'Garantía' (Warranty) badges.
Ensure the 'Agregar Equipo' (Add Equipment) and 'Registrar Soporte' (Register Support) forms open in Modals (Dialogs).
The main view should be the Data Table with Filters on top.
Detail view should be a separate page or a drawer/sheet that slides in.
Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide React for icons (e.g., Laptop, Desktop, Printer, User, Calendar).
Ensure all dates are formatted DD/MM/AAAA.
Add 'data-testid' to all inputs, buttons, and rows.

design_philosophy: Create depth through layered design elements (z-index).
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters where appropriate (e.g., sticky headers).
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, focus, active).
technical_constraints: Do NOT use 'transition: all'. Use specific transitions.
Do NOT center align the app container text.
Use modern button styles (pill or sharp, not default browser styles).
